nasb.text: Their tongue is a deadly arrow; It speaks deceit; With his mouth one speaks peace to his neighbor, But inwardly he sets an ambush for him.

esv.text: Their tongue is a deadly arrow; it speaks deceitfully; with his mouth each speaks peace to his neighbor, but in his heart he plans an ambush for him.

cnv.text: 他們的舌頭是殺人的利箭， 嘴裡說的是詭詐； 跟鄰舍說話滿口甜言蜜語， 心底裡卻設計陷害他。

ccb.text: 他们舌如毒箭，说话诡诈， 对邻居口蜜腹剑。
